docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DELEPINE, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DELEPINE, BORIS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: 0) SERVED JAN-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, PATRICIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELEPINE, BORIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, PATRICIA $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00, PLAINTIFF LOANED DEFENDANT $1500.00; DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGED THE DEBT IN TEXT MESSAGES YET FAILED TO PAY THE AMOUNT OWED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY DELEPINE, BORIS
